deals.title: Wah Kwong orders up to four tankers at DSIC
deals.summary: Wah Kwong Maritime Transport has placed an order for two 114,000 dwt LR2 tankers at DSIC, with options for two additional vessels. The newbuildings feature LNG-ready and methanol-ready designs compliant with IMO Tier III and EEDI Phase 3 standards, reflecting continued fleet renewal appetite and a push toward future-fuel readiness.

deals.title: Hyundai Rotem signs Ho Chi Minh City metro contract
deals.summary: Hyundai Rotem signed a 491bn won contract with THACO Group to supply driverless metro trainsets for Ho Chi Minh City Metro Line 2, marking South Korea's first rolling stock export to Vietnam. The deal includes a local manufacturing component and an MoU for signalling systems, positioning Hyundai Rotem as a key player in Southeast Asia's fast-growing urban rail market.

deals.title: Conduent sells Public Transit business to Modaxo
deals.summary: Conduent agreed to sell its Public Transit division — covering transit fare management and fleet management solutions — to Modaxo for $164M. The divestiture is part of Conduent's portfolio simplification strategy and is expected to close before end of 2026, pending regulatory approval.
